checklist.question: Did receivables grow materially faster than revenue across consecutive periods?

evidence.location: ReceivablesNetCurrent, FY2013 comparative balance sheet in 10-K

checklist.question: Did non-current 'soft' assets (intangibles, other assets, capitalized items) grow materially faster than the business overall?
Is there a persistent divergence between net income and operating cash flow?

evidence.location: Cash flow statement and income statement, FY2012 comparatives in 10-K
Cash flow statement and income statement, FY2013 in 10-K
Cash flow statement and income statement, FY2014 in 10-K

checklist.question: Do inventory levels or gross margins show trends inconsistent with revenue?

evidence.quote: No inventory or gross margin concept provided in dataset (REIT business model, rental income, no inventory)
evidence.location: Overall dataset - absence of Inventory/Revenue line items

checklist.question: Is the earnings trajectory unusually smooth relative to the volatility of revenue and cash flow?

evidence.quote: NetIncomeLoss=-160713000 (2012 annual); NetIncomeLoss=-118883000 (2013 annual); NetIncomeLoss=132851000 (2014 annual)

evidence.location: Quarterly ProfitLoss figures showing swing from large losses to profits

checklist.question: Did liability, allowance, or reserve balances decline (or fail to grow) despite growing business activity?

evidence.location: Balance sheet, Assets line, 2012 vs 2015 (business size roughly stable/slightly declining, consistent with liability decline via deleveraging)
Equity growth via IPO/follow-on offerings explains liability decline

checklist.question: Does the filing chronology show irregularities (late filings/NT forms, amendments, unusual 8-K frequency)?

evidence.quote: 10-K filed 2014-03-12; 10-K filed 2015-02-19 (regular annual cadence, no NT 10-K observed)
DEFR14A filing_date=2015-04-15 (one day after DEF 14A on 2015-04-14)
evidence.location: Filing chronology list - revised proxy, minor irregularity

checklist.question: Is the provided data sufficient in coverage and length for the above assessments?

evidence.quote: No Revenues, IntangibleAssets, OtherAssets, Inventory, or AllowanceForDoubtfulAccounts concepts included in the provided financial_series_point_in_time dataset
evidence.location: Overall dataset structure - missing key line items needed for CL1, CL2, CL4, CL6 full analysis

top_signals: Persistent large gap between NetIncomeLoss and NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities across 2012-2014 (e.g., NI=-160713000 vs OCF=268847000 in 2012; NI=132851000 vs OCF=479210000 in 2014), though this appears largely explained by substantial real estate depreciation (DepreciationAndAmortization=488524000 in 2012), a normal REIT characteristic rather than an earnings-quality red flag

Missing key data (revenue, intangible assets, allowance/reserve balances) prevents full evaluation of receivables-vs-revenue growth (CL1) and soft-asset growth (CL2), limiting overall confidence in the assessment

Equity and liability shifts (Liabilities declining from 7305908000 in 2012 to 6595936000 in 2015-09-30; StockholdersEquity rising from 2276354000 to 2931687000 over the same period) are consistent with the company's October 2013 IPO and subsequent follow-on equity/debt offerings rather than indicating any obscured deterioration in obligations

Filing chronology shows normal 10-K/10-Q cadence with no NT filings or restatements (10-K/A, 10-Q/A) evident; minor items (one 8-K/A, one DEFR14A) appear routine and are not indicative of irregularity
